problem_text_cn:
## 六、(25分)

玩具“章鱼保罗”有一个轴对称的身体和八条腿，身体质量近似等于八条腿质量之和。开始时将保罗静立在水平桌面上如图1所示，后因扰动滑倒在桌面上如图2所示，本题欲讨论保罗在滑倒过程中，腿的着地点是否会从桌面跳起?如果不会跳起，那么腿和身体几乎能一起与桌面发生碰撞.若为弹性碰撞，那么保罗能否又恢复到初始状态，形成周期运动?

如图3所示，将保罗八条腿合并后，模型化为一根长l，质量m的均匀细杆，下端点A可沿桌面不妨碍为朝左运动.保罗的身体模型化为质量也是m的小圆柱体，通过小而轻的轴承连接在杆的上端点B，侧面贴在假想的竖直固定轨道上下平动，且不会离开该轨道.初态静止，杆与竖直轨道间夹角$ \theta_{0} $很小，随后杆倾斜着下滑，过程态已在图3中示出，再设，系统处处无摩擦.

(1)近似取$ \theta_{0}=0 $，先后导出B端下行加速度$ a_{B} $以及A端受桌面支持力N随倾角$ \theta $变化的函数关系，进而(可采用作函数曲线方法或采用函数求极值或最值的方法)判定在杆整体倒地前，A端是否全离开桌面?
(2)假设A端不全离开桌面，杆连同B端小柱体一起与桌面发生弹性碰撞，碰撞前后瞬间系统动能相同，碰撞时间记为未知量$ \Delta t $，设碰撞前，若某处相对桌面的速度大小为v，则该处单位质量物质受到桌面竖直向上的(时间上)平均碰撞力f与v成正比，比例系数记为未知量$ \alpha $.再将碰撞过程中的细杆与小柱体之间通过轴承在竖直方向上的(时间上)平均相互作用力大小记为未知量$ N_{B} $，碰撞瞬间细杆中心点C竖直向上的速度大小记为未知量$ v_{C} $，细杆绕C点旋转角速度大小记为未知量$ \omega $.
(2.1)试求$ v_{C} $，$ \omega $，$ \alpha\Delta t $和$ N_{B}\Delta t $;
(2.2)若章鱼保罗(即杆与小柱体构成的系统)的运动具有周期性，取$ \theta_{0}=1^{\circ} $，导出周期T的积分表达式，再通过数值积分给出只含参量l，g(重力加速度)的T表达式.

附注:1.题文中所言“着地点”、“倒地前”的“地”均指桌面.
2.可提供的定积分参考公式为:
$$ \int_{\Gamma_{0}}^{\omega_{0}}\sqrt{\frac{3}{1-\cos\theta}\frac{\sin^{2}\theta+1}{\sin\theta}}d\theta=7.82, $$
王达(北京大学物理学院2004级)，舒幼生，2011年10月
problem_text_en:
## Six. (25 points)

The toy “Paul the Octopus” has an axially symmetric body and eight legs; the body mass is approximately equal to the sum of the leg masses. Initially, Paul is placed upright on a horizontal tabletop as shown in Figure 1, and later slips and tilts due to a disturbance as shown in Figure 2. The problem explores whether, during the tilting process, the contact point of the legs will jump off the tabletop? If it does not jump off, then the legs and the body can almost collide with the tabletop simultaneously. If the collision is elastic, can Paul return to the initial state and form periodic motion?

As shown in Figure 3, after merging the eight legs, the system is modeled as a uniform thin rod of length l and mass m. The lower end A can slide on the tabletop (no hindrance) to the left. The body is modeled as a small cylinder of mass m, connected to the upper end B of the rod via a small, light bearing, and its side presses against an imaginary vertical fixed track, moving up and down without leaving the track. Initially at rest, the rod makes a small angle $ \theta_{0} $ with the vertical track; then the rod tilts and slides down, as shown in the process state in Figure 3. Moreover, the system is frictionless everywhere.

(1) Approximately take $ \theta_{0}=0 $. Derive successively the downward acceleration $ a_{B} $ of end B and the supporting force N at end A from the tabletop as functions of the tilt angle $ \theta $. Then (by drawing function curves or by finding extreme/maximum values) determine whether end A will completely leave the tabletop before the rod completely falls down.
(2) Assume that end A does not completely leave the tabletop; the rod together with the small cylinder at B undergo an elastic collision with the tabletop. The kinetic energy of the system is the same just before and just after the collision. The collision duration is denoted as an unknown $ \Delta t $. Suppose that before collision, if a point has a speed v relative to the tabletop, then the average collision force (in time) per unit mass exerted by the tabletop on that point, pointing vertically upward, is proportional to v, with proportionality coefficient $ \alpha $. Denote the average interaction force (in time) in the vertical direction between the rod and the small cylinder via the bearing during the collision as an unknown $ N_{B} $; denote the vertical upward speed of the center C of the thin rod at the moment of collision as an unknown $ v_{C} $; and denote the angular speed of rotation of the rod about point C as an unknown $ \omega $.
(2.1) Find $ v_{C} $, $ \omega $, $ \alpha\Delta t $, and $ N_{B}\Delta t $.
(2.2) If the motion of “Paul the Octopus” (i.e., the system of rod and small cylinder) is periodic, take $ \theta_{0}=1^{\circ} $, derive the integral expression for the period T, and then give the T expression containing only the parameters l and g (gravitational acceleration) via numerical integration.

Notes: 1. The “ground” referred to in the text as “contact point” and “before falling down” means the tabletop.
2. A reference definite‑integral formula is provided:
$$ \int_{\Gamma_{0}}^{\omega_{0}}\sqrt{\frac{3}{1-\cos\theta}\frac{\sin^{2}\theta+1}{\sin\theta}}d\theta=7.82. $$
Wang Da (Peking University, Physics School, Class 2004), Shu Yusheng, October 2011.
problem_solution_cn:
(1) 下滑过程态及相应的参量如题解图1所示，有
$$ v_{B}=\omega l\sin\theta,\quad\Rightarrow\quad\omega=v_{B}/l\sin\theta,  $$
$$ E_{\text {kff }}=\frac{1}{2} I_{M} \omega^{2}, \quad I_{M}=\frac{1}{12} m l^{2}+m\left(\frac{l}{2}\right)^{2}=\frac{1}{3} m l^{2}, $$
$$ E_{\text {kst }}=\frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2}, $$
$$ E_{k}=E_{\text {kff }}+E_{\text {kst }}=\frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2}\left(1+\frac{1}{3 \sin ^{2} \theta}\right) . $$
$ v_{B} \sim \theta $的确定:
$$ m g l(1-\cos \theta)+m g \frac{l}{2}(1-\cos \theta)=\frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2}\left(1+\frac{1}{3 \sin ^{2} \theta}\right), $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad v_{B}^{2}=9 g l\frac{\sin ^{2}\theta(1-\cos\theta)}{3 \sin ^{2}\theta+1}. $$
$ a_{B}\sim\theta $的确定:
$$ 2 v_{B} a_{B}=\frac{\left[2 \sin \theta \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{3} \theta\right]\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)-\sin ^{2} \theta(1-\cos \theta) 6 \sin \theta \cos \theta}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} \cdot \omega \cdot 9 g l $$
$$ =\frac{2 \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{2} \theta\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} 9 g v_{B}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad a_{B}=\frac{2 \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{2} \theta\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} \cdot \frac{9}{2} g. $$
$ N\sim\theta $的确定:
$$ P_{\perp}=m v_{B}+m v_{C\perp}\left|_{v_{C\perp}=\frac{1}{2} v_{B}}=\frac{3}{2} m v_{B},\right. $$
$$ 2 m g-N=\frac{\mathrm{d} p_{\perp}}{\mathrm{d} t}=\frac{3}{2} m a_{B}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad N=2 m g-\frac{3}{2} m a_{B}=2 m g-\frac{27}{4} m g \frac{2 \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{2} \theta\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\left\{\begin{array}{l}
N=\frac{29-9 \sin ^{4} \theta-54 \cos \theta+33 \cos ^{2} \theta}{4\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} m g, \\
\text { 或 } N=\frac{62-42 \sin ^{2} \theta+9 \sin ^{2} \theta \cos ^{2} \theta-54 \cos \theta}{4\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} m g .
\end{array}\right. $$
由下面列出的$ N\sim\theta $对应表和题解图2给出的$ N\sim\theta $曲线，可以看出杆整体倒在桌面前，N始终大于零，故A端不全离开桌面。(10分)

(2) 杆落地前瞬间，相关的运动学量为
B端竖直向下速度$ v_{B0}=\frac{3}{2}\sqrt{gl} $，
细杆中心点C的竖直向下速度$ v_{C0}=\frac{1}{2}v_{B0} $，
细杆绕C点旋转角速度$ \omega_{0}=v_{B0}/l $，
细杆中与A端相距x处的竖直向下速度$ v_{0}(x)=\omega_{0}x=\frac{x}{l}v_{B0} $.
(2.1) 碰后运动学量以及碰撞相关的竖直方向作用力，已在题解图3中示出，其中桌面提供的碰撞力都用字符F代表，且有
$$ F_{B}=fm=\alpha v_{B0}m, $$
$$ dF=fdm=[\alpha v_{0}(x)](\frac{dx}{l}m)=\alpha v_{B0}\frac{m}{l^{2}}x dx. $$
下面将要列出的5个独立方程中含有5个独立未知量：
$ \alpha\Delta t $，$ N_{B}\Delta t $，$ v_{B} $，$ v_{C} $，$ \omega $.
题解图3
小柱体的动量方程：
$$ F_{B}\Delta t-N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{B}+v_{B0}),\quad\Rightarrow\quad mv_{B0}(\alpha\Delta t)-N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{B}+v_{B0}). $$

杆的动量方程：
$$ \left[\int_{0}^{l} dF\right]\Delta t+N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{C}+v_{C0}),\quad\left\{\begin{array}{l}
\int_{0}^{l} dF=\alpha v_{B0}\frac{m}{l^{2}}\int_{0}^{l} x\mathrm{~d} x=\frac{1}{2}\alpha v_{B0}m\\
v_{C0}=\frac{1}{2} v_{B0}
\end{array}\right. $$
$$ \Rightarrow\frac{1}{2}mv_{B0}(\alpha\Delta t)+N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{C}+\frac{1}{2}v_{B0}). $$

杆的质心参考系中杆的定轴转动方程：
$$ \left[\int_{0}^{l} dF\cdot\left(x-\frac{l}{2}\right)+N_{B}\cdot\frac{l}{2}\right]\Delta t=(I_{C}\beta)\Delta t=I_{C}(\omega+\omega_{0}),\quad\left\{\begin{array}{l}
\int_{0}^{l} dF\left(x-\frac{l}{2}\right)=\frac{1}{12}\alpha v_{B0}ml\\
I_{C}=\frac{1}{12}ml^{2}
\end{array}\right. $$
$$ \Rightarrow\frac{1}{12}mv_{B0}l(\alpha\Delta t)+\frac{l}{2}(N_{B}\Delta t)=\frac{1}{12}ml^{2}(\omega+\omega_{0}). $$

系统动能方程:
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} m v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} I_{C} \omega^{2} = \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} \left( 1 + \frac{1}{3 \sin^{2} \theta} \right) \big|_{v_{B} = v_{B0}, \theta = 90^{\circ}, I_{C} = \frac{1}{12} m l^{2}} $$
$$ \Rightarrow \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} m v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{24} m l^{2} \omega^{2} = \frac{2}{3} m v_{B0}^{2}. $$

运动关联方程:
$$ v_{B} = v_{C} + \omega \cdot \frac{l}{2}. $$

小结:5个独立方程如下:
$$ m v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) - N_{B} \Delta t = m(v_{B} + v_{B0}) \qquad\text{(1)} $$
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) + N_{B} \Delta t = m(v_{C} + \frac{1}{2} v_{B0}) \qquad\text{(2)} $$
$$ \frac{1}{12} m v_{B0} l(\alpha \Delta t) + \frac{l}{2}(N_{B} \Delta t) = \frac{1}{12} m l^{2}(\omega + \omega_{0}) \qquad\text{(3)} $$
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} m v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{24} m l^{2} \omega^{2} = \frac{2}{3} m v_{B0}^{2} \qquad\text{(4)} $$
$$ v_{B} = v_{C} + \omega \cdot \frac{l}{2} \qquad\text{(5)} $$
将(1)式所得
$$ N_{B} \Delta t = m v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) - m(v_{B} + v_{B0}) \qquad\text{(1)'} $$
代入(2)、(3)式，再改写(4)、(5)式，得
$$ \frac{3}{2} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) = v_{C} + v_{B} + \frac{3}{2} v_{B0} \qquad\text{(2)'} $$
$$ \frac{7}{6} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) - (v_{B} + v_{B0}) = \frac{1}{6} l(\omega + \omega_{0}) \qquad\text{(3)'} $$
$$ v_{B}^{2} + v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{12} l^{2} \omega^{2} = \frac{4}{3} v_{B0}^{2} \qquad\text{(4)'} $$
$$ v_{C} = v_{B} - \frac{1}{2} \omega l \qquad\text{(5)'} $$
将(5)'式代入(2)'、(4)'式，保留(3)'式，得
$$ \frac{3}{2} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) = 2 v_{B} - \frac{1}{2} \omega l + \frac{3}{2} v_{B0} \qquad\text{(2)''} $$
$$ \frac{7}{6} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) = v_{B} + v_{B0} + \frac{1}{6} l(\omega + \omega_{0}) \qquad\text{(3)''} $$
$$ 2 v_{B}^{2} - \omega l v_{B} + \frac{1}{3} \omega^{2} l^{2} = \frac{4}{3} v_{B0}^{2} \qquad\text{(4)''} $$
合并(2)''、(3)''式，消去$ \alpha \Delta t $，得
$$ \frac{10}{21} v_{B} + \frac{1}{7} v_{B0} = \frac{10}{21} \omega l + \frac{1}{7} \omega_{0} l \qquad\text{(6)} $$
将$ v_{B0} = \omega_{0} l $代入(6)式，得
$$ v_{B} = \omega l \qquad\text{(7)} $$
将(7)式代入(4)''式，得
$$ v_{B} = v_{B0} \qquad\text{(8)} $$
将(7)、(8)式代入(5)'式和(2)''式，得
$$ v_{C} = \frac{1}{2} v_{B0} \qquad\text{(9)} $$
$$ \alpha \Delta t = 0 \qquad\text{(10)} $$
再将(8)式、(10)式代入(1)'式，得
$$ N_{B} \Delta t = 0 \qquad\text{(11)} $$
本问所求量的解便是
$$ v_{C} = \frac{1}{2} v_{B0} = \frac{3}{4} \sqrt{gl} $$
$$ \omega = v_{B} / l = v_{B0} / l = \frac{3}{2} \sqrt{\frac{g}{l}} $$
$ \alpha \Delta t = 2 $，$ N_{B} \Delta t = 0 $. (12分)

(2.2) 上问解答中已设碰后瞬间速度、角速度方向与碰前瞬间速度、角速度方向相反，推导结果所得$$ v_{B}=v_{B 1}, v_{C}=\frac{1}{2} v_{B 1}=v_{C1}, \omega=v_{B} / l=v_{B 1} / l=\omega_{1}, $$ 又显示，碰后瞬间速度、角速度大小与碰前瞬间速度、角速度大小相同. 这意味着碰后运动为碰前运动的反演，故为周期运动.
碰前运动时间 T/2，可由
$$ d t=d \theta / \omega, \omega=v_{B} / l \sin \theta, v_{B}=3 \sin \theta \sqrt{\frac{1-\cos \theta}{3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1} g l} $$ 
得
$$ \frac{T}{2}=\int_{\theta_{0}}^{\theta_{0}^{\prime}} d t=\frac{1}{3} \frac{1}{g} \sqrt{\frac{l}{g}} \int_{\theta_{0}}^{\theta_{0}^{\prime}} \sqrt{\frac{3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1}{1-\cos \theta}} d \theta, \quad \theta_{0}=1^{\circ}, $$
系统运动周期便为
$$ T=\frac{2}{3} \sqrt{\frac{l}{g}} \int_{\theta_{0}}^{\theta_{0}^{\prime}} \sqrt{\frac{3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1}{1-\cos \theta}} d \theta, $$
将题目已给的定积分结果代入，即得
$$ T=5.12 \sqrt{\frac{l}{g}}. $$(3分)
problem_solution_en:
(1) The sliding‑down process and corresponding parameters are shown in solution diagram 1. We have
$$ v_{B}=\omega l\sin\theta,\quad\Rightarrow\quad\omega=v_{B}/l\sin\theta,  $$
$$ E_{\text {rot }}=\frac{1}{2} I_{M} \omega^{2}, \quad I_{M}=\frac{1}{12} m l^{2}+m\left(\frac{l}{2}\right)^{2}=\frac{1}{3} m l^{2}, $$
$$ E_{\text {trans }}=\frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2}, $$
$$ E_{k}=E_{\text {rot }}+E_{\text {trans }}=\frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2}\left(1+\frac{1}{3 \sin ^{2} \theta}\right) . $$
Determination of $ v_{B} \sim \theta $:
$$ m g l(1-\cos \theta)+m g \frac{l}{2}(1-\cos \theta)=\frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2}\left(1+\frac{1}{3 \sin ^{2} \theta}\right), $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad v_{B}^{2}=9 g l\frac{\sin ^{2}\theta(1-\cos\theta)}{3 \sin ^{2}\theta+1}. $$
Determination of $ a_{B}\sim\theta $:
$$ 2 v_{B} a_{B}=\frac{\left[2 \sin \theta \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{3} \theta\right]\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)-\sin ^{2} \theta(1-\cos \theta) 6 \sin \theta \cos \theta}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} \cdot \omega \cdot 9 g l $$
$$ =\frac{2 \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{2} \theta\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} 9 g v_{B}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad a_{B}=\frac{2 \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{2} \theta\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} \cdot \frac{9}{2} g. $$
Determination of $ N\sim\theta $:
$$ P_{\perp}=m v_{B}+m v_{C\perp}\left|_{v_{C\perp}=\frac{1}{2} v_{B}}=\frac{3}{2} m v_{B},\right. $$
$$ 2 m g-N=\frac{\mathrm{d} p_{\perp}}{\mathrm{d} t}=\frac{3}{2} m a_{B}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\quad N=2 m g-\frac{3}{2} m a_{B}=2 m g-\frac{27}{4} m g \frac{2 \cos \theta(1-\cos \theta)+\sin ^{2} \theta\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)}{\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}}, $$
$$ \Rightarrow\left\{\begin{array}{l}
N=\frac{29-9 \sin ^{4} \theta-54 \cos \theta+33 \cos ^{2} \theta}{4\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} m g, \\
\text{ or } N=\frac{62-42 \sin ^{2} \theta+9 \sin ^{2} \theta \cos ^{2} \theta-54 \cos \theta}{4\left(3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1\right)^{2}} m g .
\end{array}\right. $$
From the $ N\sim\theta $ table and the $ N\sim\theta $ curve in solution diagram 2, it can be seen that N is always positive before the rod completely falls down; hence end A does not completely leave the tabletop. (10 pts)

(2) Just before the rod hits the tabletop, the relevant kinematic quantities are
Vertical downward velocity of B: $ v_{B0}=\frac{3}{2}\sqrt{gl} $,
Vertical downward velocity of the center C of the rod: $ v_{C0}=\frac{1}{2}v_{B0} $,
Angular velocity of the rod about C: $ \omega_{0}=v_{B0}/l $,
Vertical downward velocity at a distance x from A: $ v_{0}(x)=\omega_{0}x=\frac{x}{l}v_{B0} $.
(2.1) Post‑collision kinematic quantities and the vertical forces involved in the collision are shown in solution diagram 3. The collision forces provided by the tabletop are denoted by F, with
$$ F_{B}=fm=\alpha v_{B0}m, $$
$$ dF=fdm=[\alpha v_{0}(x)](\frac{dx}{l}m)=\alpha v_{B0}\frac{m}{l^{2}}x dx. $$
The following five independent equations contain five unknowns:
$ \alpha\Delta t $, $ N_{B}\Delta t $, $ v_{B} $, $ v_{C} $, $ \omega $.
Solution diagram 3
Momentum equation for the small cylinder:
$$ F_{B}\Delta t-N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{B}+v_{B0}),\quad\Rightarrow\quad mv_{B0}(\alpha\Delta t)-N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{B}+v_{B0}). $$

Momentum equation for the rod:
$$ \left[\int_{0}^{l} dF\right]\Delta t+N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{C}+v_{C0}),\quad\left\{\begin{array}{l}
\int_{0}^{l} dF=\alpha v_{B0}\frac{m}{l^{2}}\int_{0}^{l} x\mathrm{~d} x=\frac{1}{2}\alpha v_{B0}m\\
v_{C0}=\frac{1}{2} v_{B0}
\end{array}\right. $$
$$ \Rightarrow\frac{1}{2}mv_{B0}(\alpha\Delta t)+N_{B}\Delta t=m(v_{C}+\frac{1}{2}v_{B0}). $$

Fixed‑axis rotation equation for the rod in its center‑of‑mass frame:
$$ \left[\int_{0}^{l} dF\cdot\left(x-\frac{l}{2}\right)+N_{B}\cdot\frac{l}{2}\right]\Delta t=(I_{C}\beta)\Delta t=I_{C}(\omega+\omega_{0}),\quad\left\{\begin{array}{l}
\int_{0}^{l} dF\left(x-\frac{l}{2}\right)=\frac{1}{12}\alpha v_{B0}ml\\
I_{C}=\frac{1}{12}ml^{2}
\end{array}\right. $$
$$ \Rightarrow\frac{1}{12}mv_{B0}l(\alpha\Delta t)+\frac{l}{2}(N_{B}\Delta t)=\frac{1}{12}ml^{2}(\omega+\omega_{0}). $$

System kinetic‑energy equation:
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} m v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} I_{C} \omega^{2} = \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} \left( 1 + \frac{1}{3 \sin^{2} \theta} \right) \big|_{v_{B} = v_{B0}, \theta = 90^{\circ}, I_{C} = \frac{1}{12} m l^{2}} $$
$$ \Rightarrow \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} m v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{24} m l^{2} \omega^{2} = \frac{2}{3} m v_{B0}^{2}. $$

Kinematic relation:
$$ v_{B} = v_{C} + \omega \cdot \frac{l}{2}. $$

Summary: five independent equations:
$$ m v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) - N_{B} \Delta t = m(v_{B} + v_{B0}) \qquad\text{(1)} $$
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) + N_{B} \Delta t = m(v_{C} + \frac{1}{2} v_{B0}) \qquad\text{(2)} $$
$$ \frac{1}{12} m v_{B0} l(\alpha \Delta t) + \frac{l}{2}(N_{B} \Delta t) = \frac{1}{12} m l^{2}(\omega + \omega_{0}) \qquad\text{(3)} $$
$$ \frac{1}{2} m v_{B}^{2} + \frac{1}{2} m v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{24} m l^{2} \omega^{2} = \frac{2}{3} m v_{B0}^{2} \qquad\text{(4)} $$
$$ v_{B} = v_{C} + \omega \cdot \frac{l}{2} \qquad\text{(5)} $$
From (1) we obtain
$$ N_{B} \Delta t = m v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) - m(v_{B} + v_{B0}) \qquad\text{(1)'} $$
Substituting into (2), (3) and rewriting (4), (5) gives
$$ \frac{3}{2} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) = v_{C} + v_{B} + \frac{3}{2} v_{B0} \qquad\text{(2)'} $$
$$ \frac{7}{6} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) - (v_{B} + v_{B0}) = \frac{1}{6} l(\omega + \omega_{0}) \qquad\text{(3)'} $$
$$ v_{B}^{2} + v_{C}^{2} + \frac{1}{12} l^{2} \omega^{2} = \frac{4}{3} v_{B0}^{2} \qquad\text{(4)'} $$
$$ v_{C} = v_{B} - \frac{1}{2} \omega l \qquad\text{(5)'} $$
Substituting (5)' into (2)' and (4)', and keeping (3)', yields
$$ \frac{3}{2} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) = 2 v_{B} - \frac{1}{2} \omega l + \frac{3}{2} v_{B0} \qquad\text{(2)''} $$
$$ \frac{7}{6} v_{B0}(\alpha \Delta t) = v_{B} + v_{B0} + \frac{1}{6} l(\omega + \omega_{0}) \qquad\text{(3)''} $$
$$ 2 v_{B}^{2} - \omega l v_{B} + \frac{1}{3} \omega^{2} l^{2} = \frac{4}{3} v_{B0}^{2} \qquad\text{(4)''} $$
Combining (2)'' and (3)'' to eliminate $ \alpha \Delta t $ gives
$$ \frac{10}{21} v_{B} + \frac{1}{7} v_{B0} = \frac{10}{21} \omega l + \frac{1}{7} \omega_{0} l \qquad\text{(6)} $$
With $ v_{B0} = \omega_{0} l $, (6) becomes
$$ v_{B} = \omega l \qquad\text{(7)} $$
Substituting (7) into (4)'' yields
$$ v_{B} = v_{B0} \qquad\text{(8)} $$
Substituting (7) and (8) into (5)' and (2)'' gives
$$ v_{C} = \frac{1}{2} v_{B0} \qquad\text{(9)} $$
$$ \alpha \Delta t = 0 \qquad\text{(10)} $$
Finally, substituting (8) and (10) into (1)' yields
$$ N_{B} \Delta t = 0 \qquad\text{(11)} $$
Thus the solutions required are
$$ v_{C} = \frac{1}{2} v_{B0} = \frac{3}{4} \sqrt{gl} $$
$$ \omega = v_{B} / l = v_{B0} / l = \frac{3}{2} \sqrt{\frac{g}{l}} $$
$ \alpha \Delta t = 2 $, $ N_{B} \Delta t = 0 $. (12 pts)

(2.2) The preceding solution assumed that the post‑collision velocity and angular velocity are opposite in direction to the pre‑collision ones, and the derived results show that
$$ v_{B}=v_{B1},\ v_{C}=\frac{1}{2} v_{B1}=v_{C1},\ \omega=v_{B}/l=v_{B1}/l=\omega_{1}, $$
with the magnitudes equal to the pre‑collision magnitudes. This means the post‑collision motion is the reverse of the pre‑collision motion, hence periodic.
The pre‑collision motion time T/2 is obtained from
$$ d t=d \theta / \omega,\ \omega=v_{B} / l \sin \theta,\ v_{B}=3 \sin \theta \sqrt{\frac{1-\cos \theta}{3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1} g l} $$ 
so that
$$ \frac{T}{2}=\int_{\theta_{0}}^{\theta_{0}^{\prime}} d t=\frac{1}{3} \frac{1}{g} \sqrt{\frac{l}{g}} \int_{\theta_{0}}^{\theta_{0}^{\prime}} \sqrt{\frac{3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1}{1-\cos \theta}} d \theta,\quad \theta_{0}=1^{\circ}. $$
The system period is therefore
$$ T=\frac{2}{3} \sqrt{\frac{l}{g}} \int_{\theta_{0}}^{\theta_{0}^{\prime}} \sqrt{\frac{3 \sin ^{2} \theta+1}{1-\cos \theta}} d \theta. $$
Substituting the given definite‑integral result yields
$$ T=5.12 \sqrt{\frac{l}{g}}. $$(3 pts)
img_cn: 图片展示了问题描述和物理模型示意图。左侧有两张章鱼玩偶照片，标注为“图1”和“图2”，分别显示其站立和倒下的状态。右侧是物理模型“图3”，描绘了一根长l、质量m的均匀细杆，其下端A在桌面上，上端B通过一个小轴承连接一个质量为m的小圆柱体。小圆柱体紧贴假想的竖直轨道。杆与竖直方向成θ角。
这是一道物理竞赛题的解题过程展示。题目是“六、(25 分)”，分三小问。第一问是下滑过程运动学和动力学分析。通过几何关系、能量守恒、动量定理等，推导了$v_B$、$a_B$、$N$关于倾角θ的表达式，并最终判断A端不会离开桌面。
该图包含一个$N$-$\theta$关系表，列出了从θ=5°到90°每隔5°的N/mg数值。表中显示N始终为正，支持A端不离桌的结论。还包含一个“题解图2”，可能描绘了N~θ曲线。
该图呈现“题解图3”和相关分析。题解图3展示了碰撞过程的受力情况，定义了碰撞力F、平均碰撞力$N_B$等。图中列出了碰撞过程涉及的两个物体的动量方程、杆的转动方程，以及后续的系统动能方程和运动关联方程。
该图是解题过程的后续部分。展示了碰撞后速度和角速度的关系，表明运动具有周期性。接着推导了碰前运动时间$\frac{T}{2}$的积分表达式，并最终得到系统周期$T=5.12\sqrt{l/g}$。
img_en: The image shows the problem description and a schematic of the physical model. On the left are two photos of an octopus‑like toy labeled "Figure 1" and "Figure 2", showing it upright and tilted respectively. On the right is the physical model "Figure 3", depicting a uniform thin rod of length l and mass m. Its lower end A is on the table, and its upper end B is connected via a small bearing to a small cylinder of mass m. The cylinder presses against an imaginary vertical track. The rod makes an angle θ with the vertical.

This picture displays the solution process of a physics competition problem. The problem is "Six, (25 points)", with three sub‑questions. The first part deals with kinematics and dynamics of the sliding‑down process. Through geometric relations, energy conservation, momentum theorem, etc., expressions for $v_B$, $a_B$, and $N$ as functions of the tilt angle θ are derived, concluding that end A does not leave the tabletop.

The picture contains an $N$‑$\theta$ relation table, listing values of N/mg for θ from 5° to 90° in steps of 5°. The table shows that N remains positive throughout, supporting the conclusion that end A stays in contact. It also includes a "Solution diagram 2", likely showing the N~θ curve.

The image shows "Solution diagram 3" and related analysis. Solution diagram 3 illustrates the forces during the collision, defining collision force F, average collision force $N_B$, etc. Momentum equations for both objects, the rotational equation for the rod, and subsequent system kinetic‑energy and kinematic‑relation equations are listed.

The picture shows the continuation of the solution. It presents the relationship between post‑collision velocities and angular velocities, indicating the motion is periodic. It then derives the integral expression for the pre‑collision motion time $\frac{T}{2}$ and finally obtains the system period $T=5.12\sqrt{l/g}$.
problem_answer:
(1) A端不会完全离开桌面。
(2.1) $v_{C}=\frac{3}{4}\sqrt{gl}$，$\omega=\frac{3}{2}\sqrt{\frac{g}{l}}$，$\alpha\Delta t=2$，$N_{B}\Delta t=0$。
(2.2) $T=5.12\sqrt{\frac{l}{g}}$。
